description: Post-Flight Debrief — auto-populated debriefs from flight data, captures crew observations, maintenance squawks, and customer feedback with automated supervisor follow-up

hard_stops.label: Safety Event Not Reported
hard_stops.logic: Crew observation indicates a safety event occurred during the mission but no AV-018 safety report has been filed — safety report is mandatory

soft_flags.label: Debrief Overdue
soft_flags.logic: Post-flight debrief has not been completed within 2 hours of mission completion

soft_flags.label: Squawk Requires Maintenance
soft_flags.logic: Crew reported a maintenance squawk that requires action before next flight — route to AV-004 for aircraft status update

soft_flags.label: Customer Complaint Logged
soft_flags.logic: Customer feedback includes a complaint — escalate to operations manager for follow-up

soft_flags.label: Supervisor Review Needed
soft_flags.logic: Debrief content flags items requiring supervisor review — schedule follow-up via AV-029 Alex
